risk_description: User who hires and terminates can cycle employees for fraudulent purposes.
User who edits employee data and runs payroll can create ghost employees.
User who creates employees and runs payroll can fabricate payroll.
User who edits data and approves comp can inflate their own compensation.
User who runs and approves payroll bypasses segregation of duties.
User who runs payroll and voids payments can divert funds.
User who enters payroll and manages taxes can manipulate withholding.
User who proposes and approves comp changes bypasses controls.
User with comp visibility and equity access can exploit insider information.
User who enrolls and administers plans can create favorable enrollments.
User who changes elections and manages carriers can manipulate plan data.
User who screens and extends offers can bypass hiring controls.
User who offers and onboards can expedite hires without proper vetting.
User who assigns and tracks training can fabricate compliance records.
User who initiates and rates reviews can manipulate evaluations.
User who rates and calibrates can override peer ratings.
User managing budgets and posting journals can misallocate HR costs.
User who forecasts and posts can justify false spending.
User who manages users and roles can grant unlimited access.
User managing orgs and creating workers can place unauthorized employees.
User who edits worker data and manages absences can grant unauthorized leave.
User who creates reports and edits data can extract and manipulate PII.
